apps.name: Subway Surfers NYC
apps.description:
**Endless runner – dodge trains and obstacles down the streets of New York City.**

DASH as fast as you can!
DODGE the oncoming trains!
Help Jake, Tricky & Fresh escape from the grumpy Inspector and his dog.

- Grind trains with your cool crew!
- Colorful and vivid HD graphics!
- Hoverboard Surfing!
- Paint powered jetpack!
- Lightning fast swipe acrobatics!
- Challenge and help your friends!

apps.name: Earth Wind Map

- Zoom and navigate across the globe easily  
- Clean and visually engaging interface

*Perfect for exploring weather data and understanding global patterns.*  

See the invisible forces of nature come to life in a stunning visual way.

## Features
- Plot *functions, parametric curves* and polar graphs in real time
- Visualise **derivatives, integrals and inequalities**
- Build interactive sliders to animate parameters
- Share any graph with a permanent URL
